body.title: The agentic loop belongs to the domain object, not the proxy — relocate loop/editor/edit machinery out of inference/
body.description:
The inference PROXY device currently contains the entire agentic execution stack: agentic_loop.py (902 LOC), architect_editor.py (615), block_apply.py (640), edit_format.py, stuck_ladder.py, domain_prompts.py, prompts/. A proxy routes and dispatches inference; it must not contain a coding agent. Akien, 2026-07-08: "the agentic loops do not go in the proxy. they go in domain objects."

WORK: relocate the execution machinery into the domain layer (the BaseDomain/CodingDomain objects that already own the escalation walk and prompts). The proxy keeps ONLY: sources, models_registry, connections, policy, dimensions, rules_engine, device (dispatch), shim, health_monitor, resource_monitor, provider_health, version_checker, budget. Also move the stray in-package test_inference.py into tests/.

**Affected files:** agentic_loop.py, architect_editor.py, block_apply.py, edit_format.py, stuck_ladder.py, domain_prompts.py, prompts/, domains/*, test_inference.py

**Scope boundary:** gated on T-inference-break-proxy-domain-cycle (the cycle must be gone first or the move re-creates it). No logic rewrite — relocation + import fixes.

**Completion criteria:** the inference package contains no agentic-loop/editor/edit-format module; domains own them.

**Test plan:** red->green — assert the inference routing package exposes no agentic_loop/architect_editor/block_apply symbol, and the coding domain still runs a full loop end to end.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: CLOSED PROVEN (proof cc.0.the-inference-proxy-contains-no-agentic @ea74a6a0, red=AssertionError -> green=passed). Moved agentic_loop.py (902 LOC), architect_editor.py (615), block_apply.py (640), edit_format.py, stuck_ladder.py, domain_prompts.py and prompts/ out of the inference proxy into the domain layer (devices/inference/domains/). Pure relocation + import rewrite, no logic change — mechanical ONLY because T-inference-break-proxy-domain-cycle first removed the device->domains->agentic_loop->device cycle. Also deleted the vestigial in-package test_inference.py (16-line no-op importing pytest inside the shipped runtime package). The proxy now holds only routing/dispatch: sources, models_registry, connections, policy, dimensions, routing_buckets, rules_engine, device, shim, health/resource/provider monitors, version_checker, budget + corpus/eval side-modules. Pinned by test_proxy_domain_layering.py (no execution machinery in the proxy; no test module shipped). Suites 579 passed (inference+scraps+granny+minion); 8100 tests collect clean; 3 pre-existing reds ticketed. NOTE: tests/dicksimnel hangs on live Hex calls — pre-existing, unrelated (verified by collection).
